fix_summary:
All 1279 tests pass. The fix is already in place in `sheet.go`. The root cause was in `valueToFormulaValue()` — it was hardcoding `formula.ErrValVALUE` for all error types. The modified code at `sheet.go:568` now uses `formula.ErrorValueFromString(v.String)` to properly preserve the original error type (`#NUM!`, `#DIV/0!`, `#REF!`, etc.) when a cell's error value is passed through to formula evaluation.

No changes to the `formula/` package are needed — the `fnYEAR`, `fnMONTH`, `fnDAY`, and ...
